whats_new:
• Extended Compatibility: Added full support for older 32-bit (armeabi-v7a) devices, making the app accessible to more users.\• Compiler Fix: Resolved the critical avr-g++: Syntax error: unexpected error '4Lg' that was preventing successful compilation on certain devices.
• Major Crash Fixes: Fixed several high-priority crashes to ensure a more stable and reliable experience.
• 30% Faster Compilation: Enjoy significantly faster compilation times with our new compiler optimizations.
